title: The Boy Who Carried a Guitar: Kikaider vs. Inazuman
titleRomaji: Guitar wo Motta Shounen: Kikaider VS Inazuman
titleEnglish: The Boy Who Carried a Guitar: Kikaider vs. Inazuman
titleNative: ギターを持った少年 -キカイダーVSイナズマン-
synopsis: The OVA Special which teams the Anime version of the legendary Henshin Hero Jiro/Jinzou Ningen Kikaider with another Toei Henshin Hero Inazuman.

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

title: ASTROBOY Tetsuwan Atom: Atom Tanjou no Himitsu
titleRomaji: ASTROBOY Tetsuwan Atom: Atom Tanjou no Himitsu
titleNative: ASTROBOY鉄腕アトム　アトム誕生の秘密
synonyms: Astro Boy: The Secret of Atom's Birth
ASTROBOY 鉄腕アトム ～アトム誕生の秘密～
synopsis: Doctor Tenma, chief of the Ministry of Science, brought a digital brain genome from an aircraft. Doctor Tenma begins a trip to Mars, then combines the genome with a robot. Doctor Tenma's son, Tobio, who had died in a traffic accident, has been revived. (Source: AstroBoy Online)

title: Gun Girls
titleNative: 枪娘
synopsis: Qiang Niang mainly tells of the protagonist Carrie, who has lost her combat memories, searching for herself and the story of her final "Awakening". In the years between 2025 to 2030, a world war involving the entire world has resulted in the demise of half the world's population, and humanity has already lost control of the direction the war shall go in. In order to seize ultimate victory, war has gradually been turned into a battle without people, similar to a game. War has already become about Satellite lasers, Bomb drones, Intelligent AI, a battlefield between unmanned gun turrets and tanks... Then, there are also a group of young maidens who uses outdated firearms to engage in battle —— the Gun Girls. Turning back the time: In order to evade capture from its own kind, an intelligent life-form from the cosmos that has come to Earth, it fused with the "Inorganic Compound" M4A1 in the warehouse of a nearby weapons dealer. In the midst of being passed from person to person, the M4A1 fi

title: Honkai: Star Rail - Harmony Greets the New Year
titleRomaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - Taiping Lin Xin Sui
titleEnglish: Honkai: Star Rail - Harmony Greets the New Year
titleNative: 崩坏：星穹铁道 太平临新岁
synonyms: Honkai: Star Rail - Animated Short "Harmony Greets the New Year"
synopsis: A new year dawns and prosperity beckons. In a certain corner of the Exalting Sanctum, Master Gongshu and his two assistants are consumed by preparations for the Xianzhou's New Year performance.

title: Galaxy Investigation 2100: Border Planet
titleNative: 銀河探査２１００年 ボーダープラネット
synopsis: This work was produced as the ninth special animated piece for the 24-hour television program by Tezuka Production, which took full charge of the original story, screenplay and direction. Tezuka Osamu crafts a love story in the time when humans are expanding into space at the end of the 21st century, employing an omnibus form similar to Bradbury's "Martian Chronicle." The story line is similar to "Phoenix: Nostalgia." Leaving the earth after marriage, a woman is left behind in space when her husband suddenly dies of a cosmic disease. These background details were used in "The Phoenix" as well. This time, her friends on the Earth head for space to save the woman who was once everyone's ideal lady. In this special animated piece, Tezuka Osamu emphasizes his basic concepts that "love can save the earth" and "only love can save humans." (Source: Official Site)

title: God Mars: Untold Legend
titleRomaji: Rokushin Gattai GodMars: Juunana-sai no Densetsu
titleNative: 六神合体ゴッドマーズ 十七歳の伝説
synopsis: Marg was deprived his little brother, Mars, by Zure, and lost his parents. Therefore, he was living alone on the planet, Gishin. He became a member of guerrilla to riot against the dictator Zure, and he fell in love with Ruru, the daughter of the leader, Ura. However, the organization was destroyed. He was trapped by Zure, and he was brainwashed to become a soldier. Then, his long cherished wish that he would meet his brother again was realized… as a duel with him. (Source: AnimeNfo)

tags.name: Aliens
tags.description: Prominently features extraterrestrial lifeforms.

tags.name: Space
tags.description: Partly or completely set in outer space.

tags.name: Super Robot
tags.description: Prominently features large robots often piloted by hot-blooded protagonists.

tags.name: Twins
tags.description: Prominently features two or more siblings that were born at one birth.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

title: The Laws of Eternity
titleNative: 永遠の法
synopsis: Ryuta and his friends from the science club visit a museum exhibit on Thomas Edison and it's there they learn about one of his proposed inventions called the "spirit phone" which would enable communication with the deceased. Later that day they bump into a shaman who claims she has a message from Edison. In an instant Ryuta is given the necessary knowledge he needs to construct the device and decides to go for it, so beginning a spiritual adventure. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Goliath the Super Fighter
titleNative: ゴワッパー5ゴーダム
synopsis: Five youths from Edo City explore a strange rocky island and discover the mecha that Doctor Hoarai had been creating in order to resist the impending attack by a race of subterranean rock people. Doctor Hoarai was ridiculed by the scientific community for his predictions that such an attack would take place. The youths decide to join the doctor (who was dead but had transferred his mind into a computer) in piloting the vehicles and protecting Earth. The Gowapper 5 Godam team is born! With the aid of the giant fighting robot Godam, the Gowapper team under the leadership of Yoko Misaki must face the hordes of the inhuman subterranean people.

title: Kin to Tetsu
titleNative: 菌と鉄
synopsis: Dante's life on Amigasa seemed normal enough to him, even though everyone around him called him an oddball. But when a chance meeting with a young woman named Aoi changes everything, Dante can no longer sit idly by...unless, of course, he is made to! (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Mushrambo (2008)
titleNative: マシュランボー (2008)
synopsis: Kokoro wo Chikara ni: The story follows the human girl Yakumo, who awakens from cryogenic sleep in a devastated world destroyed by genetically engineered lifeforms, Enterrans. With the help of a few friendly Enterrans, she goes on a journey to find more human survivors and bring peace between the two factions. Owaranai Chikyuu: After restoring the world to order, one threat remains for Yakumo and her friends. The cause of the war itself, hidden deep inside a meteorite that crashed at the start of the war, a cause that's about to resurface.

title: Ni Zai Xingguang Shenchu
titleNative: 你在星光深处
synonyms: Ni Zai Xing Guang Shen Chu
synopsis: Will the starlight twinkling between the fingers cause harm, or is it a warm embrace? Xi Bai and his close friend Chunchun Liu suffered a bizarre car accident. The assistant Zhuo Han who appeared afterwards was actually a personal bodyguard with mysterious abilities. A famous gallery invited Chunchun Liu to open a painting exhibition with excellent conditions. The bodyguard Yuanchen Wang, who appeared afterwards, seemed to have a mysterious past. With danger lurking on every side of these four men and the exhibition approaching, the truth behind it all slowly begins to surface... (Source: Bilibili, translated)

synopsis: A flash anime based on the 1986 Famicom (Nintendo Entertainment System) game.

title: Mashin Hero Wataru: The Seven Spirits of Ryujinmaru
titleRomaji: Mashin Eiyuuden Wataru: Shichi Kon no Ryuujinmaru
titleEnglish: Mashin Hero Wataru: The Seven Spirits of Ryujinmaru
titleNative: 魔神英雄伝ワタル 七魂の龍神丸
synonyms: Mashin Eiyuuden Wataru: Nana Tamashii no Ryuujinmaru
synopsis: Series protagonist Wataru, who goes to the world Soukaizan in response to a call about an incident there. An evil presence shrouds the area, and the robot Ryuujinmaru's power has been sealed. Together with his friends Shibaraku, Toraou, and Himiko, Wataru begins a new journey. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

title: Attack of the Super-Monsters
titleNative: 恐竜大戦争アイゼンボーグ
synopsis: Japan is being besieged by evil Dinosaurs that humanity have long thought extinct, they are back and are creating disaster. To counter the threat, a special team of expert warriors called Aizenborg were created. Lamees and Kamal use their special powers to combine into Super Aizenborg to battle the evil Satola and his Dinosaur army. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Tokusatsu
tags.description: Prominently features elements that resemble special effects in Japanese live-action shows

tags.name: Mixed Media
tags.description: Features a combination of different media and animation techniques. Often seen with puppetry, textiles, live action footage, stop motion, and more. This does not include works with normal usage of CGI in their production.

tags.name: Dinosaurs
tags.description: Prominently features Dinosaurs, prehistoric reptiles that went extinct millions of years ago.

tags.name: Super Robot
tags.description: Prominently features large robots often piloted by hot-blooded protagonists.

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

tags.name: Cyborg
tags.description: Prominently features a human character whose physiological functions are aided or enhanced by artificial means.

title: X Maiden
titleNative: エクスメイデン
synopsis: In 20XX C.E., a mysterious alien race named Firow suddenly appears on Earth. The Firow's dreadful attacks force humanity to engage in a difficult battle. But humanity's last hope, the X Maiden who wear weapons built to destroy the Firow, are about to set out. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Geisters: Fractions of the Earth
titleNative: ガイスターズ
synopsis: A radio-active asteroid nearly destroys the Earth. Knowing it will be hard to survive the aftermath, many of the survivors leave Earth to live their lives in space colonies. 400 years later, the colonists return to Earth to reclaim their planet. Unfortunately, Earth isn't the same as when they left it. (Source: AnimeNfo)

title: Hyouga Senshi Gaislugger
titleNative: 氷河戦士ガイスラッガー
synopsis: A cyborg warrior from an ancient Antarctic kingdom awakes 30000 years later from an accidental hibernation to find the Earth changed and an old alien enemy on the verge of invasion. It's up to Guyslugger to use his ancient technology to defeat the aliens.

title: Doraemon: Nobita to Mirai Noto
titleNative: ドラえもん のび太と未来ノート

title: KJ File 2nd Season
titleNative: KJファイル 第2期
synopsis: The second season of KJ File .

tags.name: Kaiju

tags.name: Anthology

title: Negadon: The Monster from Mars
titleNative: 惑星大怪獣ネガドン
synopsis: A world of the future, madly over populated, searches for a new home on Mars to help support humanity. After terraforming Mars into a habitable landscape a Japanese ship returning from the planet crash-lands on a Tokyo street, unleashing a terrible monster. The only man who can stop Negadon is Dr. Narasaki, and his robot Miroku... (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Kakyuusei: Hajimemashite Tina!
titleNative: 下級生はじめまして ティナ!
synopsis: An unreleased episode of Kakyuusei that was available on the 7th VHS/DVD. It is set in an alternate universe where Ai and Miko aren't the main heroines. It focuses on Tina's (an alien who can fly) love conquest of Tsuyoshi. Tina, along with several other characters featured, were absent from the main series.

title: Breakage
titleNative: ブレイクエイジ
synopsis: In 2007, the inhabitants of Danger Planet II fight their battles using remote-controlled robots also known as virtual puppets. Kirio Nimura is a high school student and the strongest puppeteer on the planet who falls for Sairi Takahara; however, she insists that nobody may make advances until they have beaten her puppet, Benkei. (Source: Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Ginga Hyouryuu Vifam 13
titleNative: 銀河漂流バイファム13
synopsis: On July 27 1996, Mr. Takeyuki Kanda died suddenly at the age of 52. Born August 11 1943, he was known as the director of several animations including VIFAM. Thus in 1998 a new TV series of VIFAM was broadcasted in memory of him. Televised 1998/3/21-1998/10/3 (in Kansai area), it contains 26 episodes, and like Twelve people disappeared it is a sidestory, but some new features are added: new persons, new RV, etc. The story could be inserted between #22 and #26 (#24 and #25 are digests) of VIFAM, and is divided into three parts: Act I (#1-14), Interlude (#15-18), Act II (#19-26), if we name them (in reality Act I and II have little relationship). It could also be the New Testament, but it is now regarded as an apocrypha (or worse, a pseudo-VIFAM). There are several reasons to say so, but to watch the story is the best way to understand them. (Source: u-netsurf.ne.jp/~suemura/vifam/vguide.html)

title: Watt Poe
titleRomaji: Watt Poe to Bokura no Ohanashi
titleNative: ワット・ボーとぼくらのお話
synopsis: The legend of Watt Poe, a mysterious whale said to give happiness, in a world destroyed many years ago by a nuclear war.
